relay_text: Operator suspects unexplored rate-attack vectors beyond current Wyner-Ziv/DP1/procedural-codebook/null-space set; spawned rate-attack memo worker 019e3cd7-fc54-7af1-9493-3445c4ae63f4 to evaluate scorer-feature-space, contest-video-as-codebook, decoder-side search, cross-archive pooling, ZIP/min-header, and dead-byte audit vectors as top-priority Codex goal-loop inputs.

Rate-attack research expanded from 13 to 43 vectors. New high-signal additions: YUV-native scorer representation, hardware-codec deterministic byte derivation, PoseNet Hydra unused dims 7-12, SegNet non-argmax logits, and CPU-vs-GPU leaderboard asymmetry. Spawned Dirac 019e3ce0-d68f-76f2-9191-0c0496a5cf23 for 29-vector YUV/hardware deep memo and Kuhn 019e3ce2-8f88-70f2-a866-2048654cbad9 for STRUCTURAL INFORMATION NOT SHIPPED meta-paradigm. Registered RATE-OP-1/2/3 plus process blocker tasks in canonical_task_status as prediction_only, no score claim.

B1 Phase 1 probe machinery landed but is blocked from Phase 2 authority: canonical upstream/videos/0.mkv is HEVC/YUV420p, not AV1; local CPU decode now uses evaluator AVVideoDataset conversion; T4 DALI/CUDA identity and rendered-frontier query custody are required. Separate xhigh audit found over-conservative authority bottlenecks for A1/deterministic-packet paths: exact-readiness only accepts PR101 runtime-consumption proof, strict-scorer scan is raw-token-based, byte-floor dispatch veto ignores distortion improvement, and autopilot lacks no-score timing-smoke/replay authority.
